'''鈭歝h-v-l-l''' ('''kachavleloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:necklace|necklace]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:necklace|necklace]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-v-l-l
|-
! Lemma
| kachavleloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichavleloko|thichavleloko]] || [[word:jichavleloko|jichavleloko]] || [[word:shichavleloko|shichavleloko]] || [[word:kichavleloko|kichavleloko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
